10 Supervisor, campus budget officer, and approved by the Campus Director/University President prior to the rendition of overtime services.

Section 8 The immediate supervisor, as accountable officer, shall ascertain the number of hours rendered as indicated in the Daily Time Record (DTR) commensurate to the output(s) presented. Proof(s) shall no longer be attached to the DTR, and the immediate supervisor may require additional supporting documents and other objective evidences.

qa_pairs.question: Can an employee render overtime services without prior approval from the Campus Director/University President?
qa_pairs.answer: No, according to Section 8, an employee must obtain prior approval from the immediate supervisor and the Campus Director/University President before rendering overtime services.

qa_pairs.question: What is the role of the accountable officer in ensuring compliance with overtime policies?
qa_pairs.answer: The accountable officer is responsible for ascertaining the number of hours rendered as indicated in the Daily Time Record (DTR) and verifying that the employee has obtained prior approval for any overtime work.
